meta-description: Learn about chronic disease management by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Chronic disease management
excerpt: An integrated care approach to managing illness which includes screenings, check-ups, monitoring and coordinating treatment, and patient education. It can improve your quality of life while reducing your health care costs if you have a chronic disease by preventing or minimizing the effects of a disease.
